title: Editing/deleting Monday Campaign templates
excerpt:

posts.author: culturehousecc (CultureHouse)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We would like to be able to edit templates we have created in Monday Campaigns, instead of just creating an entirely new template for any minor change. We would also like to delete old templates we no longer use, instead of accumulating more and more.

What are you trying to achieve

We can easily create message templates in Monday Campaigns, but not edit or delete them once created. We would like to be able to modify our library to update and delete templates as needed.

posts.author: ajfrasure (AJ Frasure)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% This is a must have feature for creating things for our teams to use. It’s also very frustrating when we have to make a minor change on a template. At this point, I have 10 different versions of the same design. It makes it very difficult for our teams to know which template to use.
